verdict_reasoning: BDKRB1 is a canonical G-protein coupled receptor (GPCR) belonging to the bradykinin-receptor family. GPCRs are constitutively membrane-integrated proteins with 7 transmembrane helices, an extracellular N-terminus, and three extracellular loops. The receptor's ligand-binding site for bradykinin (a 9 aa extracellular peptide) is formed by extracellular loops and upper transmembrane regions. The protein body is stably present on the outer face of the plasma membrane via its transmembrane topology.
